allow: Bash(python -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(f\).read\(\)\) for f in ['config.py','loader.py','rag_chain.py','ui.py','main.py']]; print\('All files pass syntax check'\)")
Bash(python -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\) for f in ['config.py','loader.py','rag_chain.py','ui.py','main.py']]; print\('All files pass syntax check'\)")
